roleAdoption.subtitle: What became possible that wasn't before:

inviter.title: VisMan for Inviters
inviter.i1: Invite multiple visitors at once — one form, no email chains, no phone calls
inviter.i2: Track every invitation in real time, from submission all the way to gate check-in
inviter.i3: Answer security questions instantly, from anywhere, on any device
inviter.i4: Your full invitation history — searchable, month by month — always at your fingertips
inviter.i5: If you're unavailable, your supervisor steps in directly — nothing ever gets stuck
inviter.mobile: VisMan works in your browser on any device. No installation, no IT ticket, no waiting.

security.title: VisMan for Security
security.i1: Review and decide visitor requests from your smartphone — the mobile app works anywhere
security.i2: Every visitor comes with a reliability score built from real historical data
security.i3: Ask the inviter a clarification question in-system — tracked, logged, no email needed
security.i4: Refuse or blacklist in one click — the block applies across all future visits automatically
security.i5: Every decision is logged with a timestamp — no manual registers, no handover notes
security.mobile: Install the VisMan Security app on any smartphone. Review tasks in the field, away from your desk, without VPN.

gatekeeper.title: VisMan for Gatekeepers
gatekeeper.i1: See every expected visitor before they arrive — no surprises, no paper lists
gatekeeper.i2: Check in visitors from your phone, even without internet — the app works fully offline
gatekeeper.i3: GPS-stamped check-ins record exactly where and when — automatic, zero paperwork
gatekeeper.i4: Your weekly schedule organised by day, updated live, always on your screen
gatekeeper.i5: Your performance — streaks, on-time rate, ranking — tracked automatically and shown to you
gatekeeper.mobile: Install the VisMan Gatekeeper app on your phone like a native app. No company laptop needed at the gate.

whyUs.heroText: The future of secure, human-centred facility access is not a sign-in book. It is a living workflow — one that respects your people, protects your premises, and gives every team member the right tool for their role.
whyUs.problemText: Every day, thousands of employees spend minutes — sometimes hours — chasing approvals for visitors over email, phone, and shared spreadsheets. Security officers make decisions without context. Gatekeepers turn away or wave through people they cannot verify. Compliance teams scramble when an auditor asks who was in the building last Tuesday. The cost is not just friction — it is risk.
whyUs.solutionText1: We built a system where every role has exactly the interface it needs, connected by a transparent, auditable BPMN workflow. The inviter fills one form. Security gets the full context, history, and a reliability score. The gatekeeper sees today's expected arrivals on a clean mobile screen. The admin sees everything, in real time, across every location.
whyUs.solutionText2: No emails. No spreadsheets. No guesswork. Just a calm, structured process — built to make your team's working day better.
whyUs.f1desc: Open-source Operaton BPM engine. Your data stays on your infrastructure, always.
whyUs.f2desc: BPMN processes your team can read, modify, and evolve — no code required.
whyUs.f3desc: Three purpose-built apps — desktop, mobile PWA, gatekeeper PWA — each crafted for one job.
whyUs.f4desc: Every action timestamped and stored. Full audit trail, always ready, zero extra effort.
whyUs.f5desc: Six languages built in. Multi-site support with independent entrance rosters and supervisor hierarchies.
whyUs.f6desc: Offline-first gatekeeper app syncs GPS-stamped check-ins the moment connectivity returns.
whyUs.ctaText: This system is not a prototype — it is a fully running proof of concept, loaded with six global offices, 214 users, and a year of simulated activity. Every feature you see is live, testable, and ready to be evaluated against your real requirements.
whyUs.ctaQuote: "We did not set out to build a visitor form. We set out to give every person who walks through your doors — and every person who invited them — an experience worth remembering."
